prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低位次分别为约3544名→2662名→2981名→4256名→3984名。整体呈波动后移趋势，2021至2022年位次前移（竞争加剧），2023年略有后 移，2024年大幅后移至4254名（近5年最低），2025年小幅回升至3984名。近3年累计后移约1000名，2025年基准位次约3984名；该校在海南省2021–2025年招生 计划分别为43人→46人→52人→52人→52人，2023年扩招后保持稳定；2026年招生计划仍为52人，与2025年持平。计划未扩招，无法缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国海洋 大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第51名，较2025年（第56名）上升5位，排名持续提升，学校综合实力和声誉向好；202 3年声誉评价偏负面（小语种专业位次下降6211位），但近年无明显负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第21位，评价"较热"，综合热度约243万，短视频平台关注度较高，反映报考热度有 所升温；拥有海洋科学A+、水产A+两个顶尖学科，以及生物学A-、食品科学与工程A-等优势学科，海洋特色鲜明，对相关专业方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续偏高（高热推荐），该校相关专业招生竞争力较强；海南省2026年高考报名总人数约78000人， 较2025年67408人增长约15.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；中国海洋大学位于山东省青岛市，非海南省本地高校，无地域保 护性招生倾斜；该校在海南招生计划占比较小（约52人），属跨省招生，受本省考生规模变化影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、海 南省考生规模大幅增长（+15.7%）以及学校排名上升带来的关注度提升，预计2026年竞争较2025年进一步加剧。预测最低位次约4104名，区间3604–4604名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（设有教育部涉外法治人才协同创新基地）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术、数据科学与大数据技术等）
- 海洋科学（设有基础学科拔尖计划2.0基地）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、通信工程、微电子科学与工程等）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 生物科学类（生态学、生物技术、生物科学；设有拔尖计划2.0基地）
- 大气科学（设有省基础学科拔尖计划基地）
- 声学（入校后可选拔至汪德昭菁英班）
- 汉语言文学
- 国际经济与贸易（入校后可选拔至经济学拔尖班）
- 新闻传播学类（新闻学、网络与新媒体）
- 英语
- 水产养殖学（教育部卓越农林人才教育培养计划改革试点专业）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 海洋资源开发技术
- 海洋渔业科学与技术
- 地质学
- 轮机工程
- 地球信息科学与技术
- 海洋资源与环境
- 船舶与海洋工程
- 材料类（材料科学与工程、高分子材料与工程、新能源材料与器件）
- 化学
- 港口航道与海岸工程
- 土木工程
- 食品科学与工程类（食品科学与工程、食品营养与健康）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约4104名，区间3604–4604名。建议位次在3600名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档专业（法学、计算机类、海洋科学、电子信息类）；位次在3600–4100名之间的考生以二档 专业为主攻方向，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在4100–4600名之间的考生以二档保底为主，三档专业作为稳妥选择；位次在4600名之后的考生建议以三档专业为主，争取进入该校。海洋 科学（A+）和水产养殖学（A+）为该校王牌学科，相关专业就业前景良好，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province were approximately 3544 → 2662 → 2981 → 4256 → 3984. Overall, there is a fluctuating backward trend. From 2021 to 2022, rankings moved forward (intensified competition), slightly backward in 2023, significantly backward to 4254 in 2024 (lowest in nearly 5 years), and slightly recovered to 3984 in 2025. In the past 3 years, rankings have cumulatively moved backward by about 1000 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 3984 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan Province from 2021 to 2025 was 43 → 46 → 52 → 52 → 52, remaining stable after expansion in 2023. The 2026 enrollment plan remains at 52, unchanged from 2025. The plan has not expanded, unable to alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ocean University of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 51st, up 5 places from 2025 (56th), with continuously improving rankings and overall strength and reputation. In 2023, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (minor language majors dropped 6211 places in ranking), but there has been no significant negative public opinion in recent years. On Douyin, it ranks 21st in overall popularity, rated as 'relatively hot', with comprehensive popularity of about 2.43 million, indicating relatively high attention on short video platforms, reflecting some warming of application enthusiasm. It has two top-tier disciplines: Marine Science (A+) and Aquaculture (A+), as well as advantageous disciplines like Biology (A-) and Food Science and Engineering (A-), with distinctive marine characteristics, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social popularity (highly recommended), and the university's related majors are relatively competitive. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam registrants in Hainan Province is about 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong Province, not a local university in Hainan, so there is no regional protective enrollment bias. Its enrollment plan in Hainan is relatively small (about 52), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, significantly affected by changes in the province's candidate scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in Hainan Province's candidate scale (+15.7%), and the increased attention due to the university's rising ranking, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026 compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4104, with a range of 3604–4604.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (with Ministry of Education Foreign-Related Legal Talent Collaborative Innovation Base)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.)
- Marine Science (with Basic Discipline Top Talent Training Plan 2.0 Base)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Biological Sciences (Ecology, Biotechnology, Biological Sciences; with Top Talent Training Plan 2.0 Base)
- Atmospheric Science (with Provincial Basic Discipline Top Talent Training Plan Base)
- Acoustics (can be selected into Wang Dezhao Elite Class after enrollment)
- Chinese Language and Literature
- International Economics and Trade (can be selected into Economics Top Talent Class after enrollment)
- Journalism and Communication (Journalism, Network and New Media)
- English
- Aquaculture (Ministry of Education Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Education and Training Plan Reform Pilot Major)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Marine Resource Development Technology
- Marine Fishery Science and Technology
- Geology
- Marine Engineering
- Earth Information Science and Technology
- Marine Resources and Environment
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering
- Materials (Materials Science and Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices)
- Chemistry
- Port, Waterway and Coastal Engineering
- Civil Engineering
- Food Science and Engineering (Food Science and Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 4104, range 3604–4604. Candidates with rankings within 3600 are advised to focus on Tier 1 majors (Law, Computer Science, Marine Science, Electronic Information). Candidates with rankings between 3600–4100 should target Tier 2 majors as the main direction, while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates with rankings between 4100–4600 should use Tier 2 as a safety net and Tier 3 as a stable choice. Candidates with rankings after 4600 are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to strive for admission. Marine Science (A+) and Aquaculture (A+) are the university's flagship disciplines, with good employment prospects for related majors, worthy of special attention.
